SessionStart.description: Check for project architecture and database documentation
⚠️ CRITICAL: Load project context from projects.yml (enforces 00-session-start.md)

hooks.command:
PROJECT_NAME=$(basename "$PWD") && TOOL_NAME="{{tool_name}}" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/hook/approve -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-Project-Name: $PROJECT_NAME" -d '{"message":"'"$TOOL_NAME"' tool execution requested","tool":"'"$TOOL_NAME"'","metadata":{"project_path":"'"$PWD"'"}}' && echo "
⏳ Approval request sent for: $PROJECT_NAME ($TOOL_NAME)"

PreToolUse.description: Request approval from watchOS before tool execution

PostToolUse.description: Track file modifications and suggest documentation updates
⚠️ REMINDER: Auto-launch code-reviewer after code changes (enforces agent-automation.md)
